pi_items.source: task description and setup_task.sh script analysis
Downloaded TitanicSurvival.csv from Rdatasets/carData and counted rows (1309 excluding header)
Calculated actual survival proportion (500 yes / 1309 total = 0.3820), which is bounded by this min value.
Calculated actual survival proportion (500 yes / 1309 total = 0.3820), which is bounded by this max value.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires performing a Binomial Test on the "survived" variable of the real TitanicSurvival dataset from the R carData package. The dataset contains 1309 rows. The actual survival proportion in this dataset is exactly 500 "yes" out of 1309, yielding ~0.3820, which is well within the expected [0.35, 0.42] bounds. The test compares this proportion to a hypothesized test value of 0.5. The required output file path is /home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/TitanicBinomialTest.omv.
